title: Transformer Selection
full_text:
7.2.3.1 Transformer Selection
Transformer Selection
1) Transformers shall conform to
  a) CAN/CSA-C802.1, “Minimum efficiency values for liquid-filled distribution
transformers,”
  b) CAN/CSA-C802.2, “Test method and minimum efficiency values for
dry-type transformers,” or
  c) CSA C802.3, “Minimum efficiency values for power transformers.”

clauses.text: CAN/CSA-C802.1, “Minimum efficiency values for liquid-filled distribution transformers,”
CAN/CSA-C802.2, “Test method and minimum efficiency values for dry-type transformers,” or
CSA C802.3, “Minimum efficiency values for power transformers.”
